signals.title: Oil / Geopolitical
signals.text: Watch for potential USD strength at the open amid rising oil prices and US-Iran tensions. WTI oil closed at $94.9 on Friday, nearing a key resistance level.

signals.title: CAD/JPY — BoC, BoJ Divergence
signals.text: Watch for CAD/JPY upside into the Tokyo open, driven by BoC-BoJ policy divergence. CAD closed at 1.3668 vs USD on Friday, with a 150bp carry advantage over JPY.

signals.title: CAD/EUR — G8 Bilateral Theme
signals.text: Watch for CAD/EUR upside at the open, driven by bilateral G8 theme. CAD 1W avg: +0.431% (n=3), EUR 1W avg: -0.481% (n=7), G8 spread: 0.912%.

signals.title: AUD/USD COT Positioning
signals.text: AUD/USD net long positioning at 47,218, with retail sentiment extremely short at 87%. Watch for potential reversal at the Sydney open.

signals.title: Yield Curve Regime
signals.text: US yield curve in bull flattener regime, 2s10s spread at +52.0bp. Watch for implications on CB divergence and cross-asset risk.

signals.title: NZD/USD — COT vs OIS Divergence + RBNZ
signals.text: NZD/USD Friday close: 0.5881, COT net short -18,062 vs RBNZ hike bias (40% priced), watch for short-squeeze risk at the open, next RBNZ meeting May 27.

signals.title: Yield Curve — Bull Flattener
signals.text: US 2s10s spread: +52.0bp, bull flattener regime, watch for implications on CB divergence signals and cross-asset risk narrative.

signals.title: Oil / Geopolitical
signals.text: WTI closed above $94.9 on Friday, watch for implications of Hormuz crisis at the open.

signals.title: BoJ — This Week
signals.text: BoJ meeting on April 28, watch for policy updates and implications for JPY crosses.
